rationale: This documentary-style "secret bunker reveal" hook is fundamentally incompatible with Color Road!'s abstract minimalist 3D rolling-ball gameplay — there's no narrative, landmark, or cross-section element in the game to anchor the curiosity payoff. The earthy bunker palette (#2c3e50/#d35400/#2d5a27) also clashes with the game's bright pastel-and-saturated-accent look. Skip this archetype; curiosity hooks for Color Road! should be built around "will the ball make it?" near-fail moments or color-switch puzzles, not landmark/lore reveals.
